linkedin.last_post_summary: Pichai shared his excitement about returning to Stanford University to deliver the 135th Commencement address.

data.recent_activity_summary: Pichai is actively promoting the launch of Gemma 4 models and new notebook capabilities within the Gemini app. He is also engaging in technical discussions regarding browser updates, AI research, and high-level strategy for Google's cloud and hardware initiatives.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Data is sourced from provided LinkedIn and Twitter profiles, which contain detailed timestamps and engagement metrics, allowing for high-confidence calculation of activity and frequency.
